missionPage.seoDescription: Raised was built to make trusted, evidence-based parenting guidance accessible to every family, in every region, regardless of income.
missionPage.heroLead: From Karachi to Kensington, parents share the same problem: too much conflicting advice, too little they can trust. Science tells us the early years shape everything that follows. We believe access to trusted, evidence-based guidance shouldn't depend on which postcode a child is born into.
missionPage.problemHeading: The case for trusted guidance, everywhere
missionPage.stat1Label: of brain development happens before age 5
missionPage.stat1Source: Harvard Center on the Developing Child
missionPage.stat2Label: children under 5 in developing countries at risk of poor development
missionPage.stat3Label: parents globally have no access to quality parenting guidance
missionPage.stat4Label: invested in early years support generates £10+ in long-term social benefits
missionPage.modelLead: A simple, sustainable model where paying members in developed countries fund free access for families in developing regions.
missionPage.step1Body: When families join Raised in the UK and beyond, a portion of every membership funds free access in partner regions. Same product, same evidence, same trust.
missionPage.step2Body: Families in our partner regions can sign up for free through local health organisations and NGOs. No parent should walk alone.
missionPage.step3Body: Whether in London or Lagos, every parent gets the same evidence-based adviser, adapted for local healthcare guidance and language.
missionPage.reachLead: Raised for All is in its early stages. These are the regions we're focused on reaching first — through NGO partnerships and local health organisations.
missionPage.free1Body: WHO-aligned answers in local languages, adapted to each country's healthcare guidance.
missionPage.free2Body: Text-first, low-data lessons on child development, nutrition, and safety.
missionPage.free3Body: Regional parent communities in local languages, moderated for safety.
missionPage.bottomCtaBody: Every paying family on Raised funds free access for a family that needs it most. Start your journey today.

privacy.introBody: At Raised, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application and services.
privacy.collectIntro: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
privacy.collectLi4: Photos and media (e.g. when you use the camera to add photos to moments)
privacy.cameraBody: The Raised app may request access to your device's camera and photo library so you can take and attach photos to moments, family posts, and profiles. We use this access only when you choose to add a photo. We do not access your camera or photos in the background. Photos you upload are stored securely and used only to provide the features you use within the app.
privacy.useIntro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.useLi1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.useLi2: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.useLi3: Send technical notices and support messages
privacy.useLi4: Respond to your comments and questions
privacy.securityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy.rightsLi4: Object to processing of your data
privacy.rightsP2: To request that your account and associated data be permanently deleted, open the Raised app, go to Profile, and tap "Delete my account and data", or email <support>support@raised.app</support>.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at <support>support@raised.app</support>

terms.lead: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Raised. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use Raised.
terms.s1p1: Raised is a science-backed parenting platform operated in the United Kingdom. We provide tools for family routines, child development tracking, AI-powered guidance, and family memory sharing. Our registered address and company details are available upon request at <legal>legal@raised.app</legal>.
terms.s2p1: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. By registering, you confirm that you are 18 or over and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.
terms.s2p2: Raised is intended for use by parents, guardians, and approved caregivers. You are responsible for ensuring that anyone you invite to your family account (including grandparents, nannies, or childminders) understands and accepts these Terms.
terms.s3p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately at <support>support@raised.app</support> if you suspect any unauthorised access.
terms.s3p2: You must provide accurate and complete information when registering. You may not impersonate another person, use a false identity, or create multiple accounts to evade a ban or restriction.
terms.s4p1: Raised processes data about children at your direction, as a data controller. By adding a child's information to the platform, you confirm that you are their parent or legal guardian, or that you have explicit permission from the child's parent or guardian to do so.
terms.s4p2: We process children's data only to provide the features you use. We never use children's data for advertising or sell it to third parties. For full details, see our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
terms.s5intro: You must not use Raised to:
terms.s5li1: Post content that is abusive, hateful, or harmful to children or families
terms.s5li2: Share illegal content of any kind
terms.s5li3: Harass, intimidate, or threaten other users
terms.s5li4: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to other accounts or our systems
terms.s5li5: Use automated tools, bots, or scrapers without our written permission
terms.s5li6: Provide false medical or professional credentials in the community
terms.s5li7: Violate any applicable law or regulation
terms.s5p2: We reserve the right to suspend or permanently ban any account that violates these rules, without notice in serious cases.
terms.s6p1: The AI Guide feature provides general parenting information based on publicly available guidance from sources such as the NHS, WHO, and AAP. It is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, or legal advice.
terms.s6p2: Always consult a qualified healthcare professional (such as your GP, Health Visitor, or paediatrician) for any concerns about your child's health, development, or wellbeing. In an emergency, call 999 or NHS 111.
terms.s7p1: You retain ownership of any content you post (photos, moments, community posts, etc.). By posting, you grant Raised a limited licence to store and display that content solely to provide the service to you and your invited family members.
terms.s7p2: You are responsible for any content you post. You confirm that you have the right to share any photos or media you upload, including photos of children.
terms.s8p1: All content provided by Raised — including the AI guidance, microlearning modules, design, and software — is owned by or licensed to Raised. You may not copy, redistribute, or commercially exploit our content without written permission.
terms.s9p1: We aim to keep Raised available 24/7 but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. We may need to suspend the service for maintenance, updates, or for reasons beyond our control. We are not liable for losses arising from service unavailability.
terms.s10p1: You may delete your account at any time from Settings. We may terminate or suspend your account if you breach these Terms, or if we discontinue the service. Upon termination, your data will be handled in accordance with our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
terms.s11p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Raised is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding any claim (or £100 if you are a free user).
terms.s11p2: Nothing in these Terms limits our liability for death or personal injury caused by our negligence, fraud, or any liability that cannot be excluded under English law.
terms.s12p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
terms.s13p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you via email or an in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use of Raised after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.s14p1: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at <legal>legal@raised.app</legal>.

cookies.whatP1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website or use a web app. They help services remember your preferences and understand how you use them.
cookies.whatP2: This policy explains what cookies Raised uses, why we use them, and how you can control them — in line with the UK Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations (PECR) and UK GDPR.
cookies.weUseIntro: We use the following categories of cookies:
cookies.essentialSub: Required for the service to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsSub: Help us understand how the app is used. Requires your consent.
cookies.choicesTitle: Your Choices & How to Opt Out
cookies.choicesP1: When you first visit Raised, we ask for your consent to non-essential cookies via a banner. You can change your preferences at any time:
cookies.choicesP2: You can also control cookies through your browser settings. Visit <about>aboutcookies.org</about> for guidance specific to your browser.
cookies.choicesP3: Disabling essential cookies may prevent parts of Raised from working correctly, including staying logged in.
cookies.thirdPartyP1: Some features may use services that set their own cookies. These include Google Analytics for usage statistics. We do not permit any advertising or tracking cookies from third parties on Raised.
cookies.changesP1: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in our practices or relevant law. Material changes will be communicated via the app or email.
cookies.contactP1: Questions about our use of cookies? Contact us at <privacy>privacy@raised.app</privacy>.

hero.schemaOrgDescription: The trusted parenting adviser for your whole family. Evidence-based answers that actually fit your kid.
hero.badge: Evidence-based parenting · For your whole family
hero.description: Most parenting advice is too generic, too anxious, or wrong. Raised gives you evidence-based answers that actually fit your kid, your stage, your situation. Smarter than ChatGPT, reviewed by experts, private by default.
hero.freeToStart: Free to start · No credit card required
hero.mockupQuestion: Is it normal to feel Braxton Hicks this often?
hero.mockupAnswer: Yes — completely normal at 34 weeks. They help your body prepare for labour. Stay hydrated and rest if they feel uncomfortable.
hero.mockupInsight: Your baby's lungs are nearly ready — they're practising breathing right now.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subheading: The tools parents told us they actually need
features.description: Six tools that work together. Use the ones that fit your rhythm.
features.f1Title: Ask anything. Get an answer that fits your kid.
features.f1Body: Smarter than ChatGPT for parenting. Personalised to your child's age, stage, and your family. With sources you can actually check.
features.f2Body: Pickups, appointments, clubs, parent-teacher meetings. Shared across every parent and carer in your kid's life, so the mental load stops sitting on one person.
features.f3Title: Expert-reviewed learning, on what actually matters
features.f3Body: Short, written-by-clinicians lessons on the things parents want to understand. Screen time, tween friendships, anxiety, sensitive conversations.
features.f4Body: A private family vault for the moments that matter. School reports, certificates, trips, funny lines. Yours, encrypted, never sold.
features.f5Title: Bring in the right people, with the right access
features.f5Body: Grandparents, partners, childminders, nannies. Each person sees what they need, and nothing more.
features.f6Body: A moderated community organised by your kid's actual stage. None of the influencer noise, none of the Facebook-group toxicity.

trust.t1Description: Aligned with NHS, WHO, AAP, and NICE evidence frameworks.
trust.t2Description: Your data is yours. Private, secure, and never sold.
trust.t3Description: Every article reviewed and approved by certified experts.

testimonials.heading: Parents trust Raised
testimonials.subheading: Join thousands of families already using Raised every day.
testimonials.t1Quote: I was spiralling at 3am about whether my baby's breathing was normal. Raised gave me a calm, science-backed answer in 30 seconds. I actually went back to sleep.
testimonials.t2Quote: I finally feel like I understand what my 18-month-old is going through. The daily insight alone is worth it.
testimonials.t2Name: James, dad of a toddler · Manchester
testimonials.t3Quote: As a first-time mum I had no idea what was 'normal.' Raised means I stop Googling at midnight.

aboutPage.seoTitle: About Raised — The trusted parenting adviser for your whole family
aboutPage.seoDescription: Raised is the evidence-based parenting adviser that actually fits your kid, your stage, your situation. Built by parents, reviewed by experts, private by default.
aboutPage.heroDescription: Most parenting advice is too generic, too anxious, or wrong. ChatGPT is confidently wrong. Google sends you to a forum. Raised is the trusted parenting adviser for your whole family, with evidence-based answers that actually fit your kid, your stage, your situation.
aboutPage.visionHeading: Parents deserve one source they can actually trust
aboutPage.visionP1: Real parents told us the same things, over and over. Too generic. Doesn't fit my situation. Conflicting advice. Hours lost searching. Yellow content on social media. Google answers that end in 'cancer' or 'consult a doctor.' One respondent put it plainly: bespoke solutions, for me and my child. Not generic.
aboutPage.visionP2: Raised exists to be the one place where parents can ask anything, trust the answer, and get on with their day. Evidence-based, expert-reviewed, personalised to your kid. Built for the real shape of modern family life, not a Pinterest version of it.
aboutPage.stat1Label: of brain development happens before age 5
aboutPage.stat1Source: Harvard Center on the Developing Child
aboutPage.stat2Label: of surveyed parents want personalised, evidence-based answers, not generic ones
aboutPage.stat3Label: parents globally have no access to quality parenting guidance
aboutPage.stat4Label: in long-term benefit for every £1 invested in early years
aboutPage.belief1Body: Every answer is grounded in peer-reviewed research and aligned with NHS, WHO, AAP, and NICE frameworks. Not trends, not influencer takes, not the loudest voice on Reddit.
aboutPage.belief2Body: Generic answers are why parents are tired of parenting content. Raised tailors every answer to your child's age, stage, and your family's actual situation.
aboutPage.belief3Body: Raised is shaped by what real parents told us they need, not what category convention assumes. We test every assumption with the people we serve.
aboutPage.belief4Title: Privacy is a promise, not a setting
aboutPage.belief4Body: Your family data is yours. We never sell it. We don't use your conversations to train AI models. You can delete everything in one tap.
aboutPage.platformHeading: Everything a parent needs, without the noise
aboutPage.platformSubheading: Six tools that work together. Use the ones that fit your family.
aboutPage.pillar1Body: Evidence-based answers, personalised to your kid, with sources you can actually check. Smarter than ChatGPT for parenting.
aboutPage.pillar2Body: Short, expert-reviewed lessons on the things parents actually want to understand, from screen time to tween friendships.
aboutPage.pillar3Body: A private family vault for the milestones worth keeping. Yours, encrypted, never sold.
aboutPage.pillar4Body: A moderated community where real parents share what worked, without the influencer noise.
aboutPage.pillar5Body: One shared schedule across every parent and carer in your village. Stops the dropped balls.
aboutPage.pillar6Body: Expert-reviewed articles on the parenting questions that matter, written by clinicians and child specialists.
aboutPage.raisedForAllHeading: A sustainable model for global access
aboutPage.raisedForAllBody: Families in the UK and developed markets pay a membership. A portion of every subscription funds free access for parents in partner regions, from Lagos to Lahore. The same trusted adviser, adapted for local healthcare systems and languages.
aboutPage.ctaHeading: Stop getting bad answers to important questions
aboutPage.ctaBody: Free to start. Evidence-based. Built by parents who got tired of asking ChatGPT.
aboutPage.footerTagline: The trusted parenting adviser for your whole family.

safeguarding.title: Child Safeguarding
safeguarding.intro: At Raised, the safety and wellbeing of children is our highest priority. This policy outlines how we protect children who may be affected by our platform, in line with the UK Online Safety Act 2023 and Children Act 1989.
safeguarding.emergencyTitle: If a child is in immediate danger
safeguarding.emergencyBody: Call 999 immediately. For non-emergency concerns, call NHS 111 or the NSPCC helpline on 0808 800 5000 (free, 24/7).
safeguarding.commitmentP1: Raised is committed to creating a safe digital environment for families and children. We believe every child has the right to be safe from harm, abuse, exploitation, and neglect, both online and offline.
safeguarding.commitmentP2: This policy applies to all Raised staff, contractors, and community moderators who interact with our platform or its users.
safeguarding.scopeCard1Body: Community posts, comments, and photos shared within the platform
safeguarding.scopeCard2Body: All AI Guide responses are reviewed against child safety guidelines
safeguarding.scopeCard3Body: Child profiles, photos, and milestones stored on the platform
safeguarding.scopeCard4Body: All community interactions monitored by trained moderators
safeguarding.dslP1: Raised has a designated Safeguarding Lead responsible for overseeing child protection concerns. Any safeguarding concerns must be reported to:
safeguarding.dslP2: The Safeguarding Lead holds Level 3 Safeguarding Training (in line with UK statutory guidance) and reviews all reported concerns within 24 hours on working days.
safeguarding.measuresTitle: What We Do to Keep Children Safe
safeguarding.measureAgeGating: Account creation requires users to be 18+. We do not permit children to create accounts directly.
safeguarding.measureDataMin: We collect only the minimum information necessary about children (name, date of birth, optional photo).
safeguarding.measureAccess: Child profiles are only visible to approved family members. Data is never publicly accessible.
safeguarding.measureModeration: Community content is reviewed for child safety concerns. Any content involving child exploitation is immediately removed and reported to the Internet Watch Foundation (IWF) and, where required, to the police.
safeguarding.measureAI: Our AI Guide is configured to refuse requests that could endanger children and to signpost to professional help where appropriate.
safeguarding.measureNoAds: We never use child data for advertising profiling of any kind.
safeguarding.reportIntro: If you have a safeguarding concern about content or behaviour on Raised, please:
safeguarding.reportStep1Post: button on any post, comment, or user profile within the app
safeguarding.reportStep3Pre: For urgent concerns involving criminal activity, contact the police (999 or 101) and the
safeguarding.reportOutro: We will acknowledge all reports within one working day and take appropriate action, which may include content removal, account suspension, or referral to statutory authorities.
safeguarding.resourceNSPCCDesc: National Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Children
safeguarding.resourceChildlineDesc: Free, confidential helpline for children and young people
safeguarding.resourceCEOPDesc: Child Exploitation and Online Protection Command
safeguarding.resourceGovDesc: Report child abuse or neglect to your local council
safeguarding.policyReviewBody: This policy is reviewed annually and following any significant safeguarding incident or change in relevant legislation. Our next scheduled review is February 2027.

featuresPage.seoDescription: The parenting tools that actually fit your family. Personalised evidence-based answers, expert-reviewed learning, family calendar, milestones, community.
featuresPage.heroH1: Built around how real families work,
featuresPage.heroH1Highlight: not how apps think they should
featuresPage.heroDescription: Six tools that work together. Use all of them or just the ones that fit your rhythm. Every answer is personalised to your kid. Every piece of content is reviewed by experts. Every feature was shaped by what real parents told us they actually need.
featuresPage.f1Detail: Ask in plain language, get an answer that fits your kid. Raised is smarter than ChatGPT for parenting because every answer is grounded in NHS, WHO, AAP, and NICE evidence and comes with sources you can actually check. No forum opinions, no influencer guesses, no 3am rabbit holes.
featuresPage.f2Detail: One shared calendar across every parent, grandparent, childminder, and nanny in your kids' lives. Pickups, appointments, after-school clubs, parent-teacher meetings. The household logistics that fall apart when only one person is holding them.
featuresPage.f3Detail: Short, expert-reviewed lessons on the questions parents actually want answered. Screen time and social media at 10. Tween friendships. Big emotions. Anxiety. Sensitive conversations. Written by clinicians, not influencers.
featuresPage.f4Detail: A private family vault for the milestones worth keeping. The first day of school, the school report, the certificate, the trip, the funny thing they said last Tuesday. Yours, encrypted, never sold, never used to train AI.
featuresPage.f5Detail: Bring grandparents, partners, childminders, and nannies into the right parts of family life. Each person sees what they need to see and nothing more. The mental load stops sitting on one parent.
featuresPage.f6Detail: A moderated parent community organised by your kid's actual stage, not by how cute the babies are. Ask the things you cannot Google. Hear from parents one step ahead. None of the Facebook-group toxicity.
featuresPage.trustHeading: Built to be trusted, not to be loud
featuresPage.trustT1Body: Every answer is aligned with NHS, WHO, AAP, and NICE frameworks and reviewed by certified professionals. Sources cited, every time.
featuresPage.trustT2Body: Your family data is yours. We never sell it. We don't use your conversations to train AI models. You can delete everything in one tap.
featuresPage.trustT3Body: Raised is shaped by what real parents told us they need. We test every assumption with the people we serve, then write the answers with paediatricians and child specialists.
featuresPage.ctaHeading: Stop getting bad answers to important questions
featuresPage.ctaBody: Free to start. Smarter than ChatGPT. Built by parents who got tired of asking ChatGPT.

marketingHome.seoTitle: Raised — The trusted parenting adviser for your whole family
marketingHome.seoDescription: Evidence-based answers that actually fit your kid. Smarter than ChatGPT for parenting. Built by parents, reviewed by experts, private by default.
marketingHome.heroSubtitle: Evidence-based answers that actually fit your kid, your stage, your situation. Smarter than ChatGPT for parenting.
marketingHome.heroPrivacyPill: Family data is yours. Not sold. Never used to train AI.
marketingHome.heroAskPlaceholder: Ask anything. e.g. how do I talk to my 10-year-old about social media?
marketingHome.heroNoCard: Free to start. No credit card.
marketingHome.comparisonHeading: Smarter than ChatGPT, Google, and parent forums
marketingHome.comparisonChatGptBody: Confidently wrong. No sources you can check. No memory of your kid, your stage, your situation. Designed to sound right, not to be right.
marketingHome.comparisonGoogleBody: Conflicting answers. Reddit threads from 2019. Worst-case scenarios that send you to the GP for a phase. Yellow content from influencers selling a course.
marketingHome.comparisonRaisedBody: Personalised to your kid. Grounded in NHS, WHO, AAP, and NICE evidence. Sources cited on every answer. Reviewed by paediatricians and child specialists.
marketingHome.askExamplesHeading: Real questions, real answers, in seconds
marketingHome.askExamplesSub: Click a question to ask it. Free to start, no card required.
marketingHome.askExample1: How do I talk to my 10-year-old about social media?
marketingHome.askExample2: Is my 7-year-old's tantrum normal, or do I need to act?
marketingHome.askExample3: How do I get my tween to put the phone down without a fight?
marketingHome.askExample4: My 11-year-old says everyone hates them. What do I actually do?
marketingHome.askExample5: How much screen time is okay for a 9-year-old?
marketingHome.askExample6: What's the right way to talk to my kid about death?
marketingHome.trustEyebrow: Backed by the evidence parents trust
marketingHome.trustHeading: Aligned with the guidance you'd actually quote
marketingHome.trustExpertReviewed: Reviewed by paediatricians and child specialists
marketingHome.featuresHeading: Everything a parent needs, without the noise
marketingHome.featuresSub: Six tools that work together. Here are three. See the rest on the features page.
marketingHome.feature1Title: Ask anything. Get an answer that fits your kid.
marketingHome.feature1Body: Personalised, evidence-based answers with sources you can actually check. Smarter than ChatGPT for parenting.
marketingHome.feature2Title: Expert-reviewed learning, on what actually matters
marketingHome.feature2Body: Short, written-by-clinicians lessons on screen time, friendships, big emotions, sensitive conversations.
marketingHome.feature3Body: Pickups, appointments, clubs, parent-teacher meetings. Shared across every adult in your kid's life.
marketingHome.founderHeading: Built by parents who got tired of the wrong answers
marketingHome.founderBody: Raised is built by a small team of parents and clinicians who were tired of conflicting advice, generic parenting content, and AI that sounds confident and gets it wrong. We started with a survey, not an assumption. Every feature, every answer, every claim is shaped by what real parents told us they actually need.
marketingHome.founderFootnote: Raised is shaped by an ongoing parent survey. Every assumption gets tested with the people we serve before it ships.
marketingHome.finalCtaHeading: Stop getting bad answers to important questions.
marketingHome.finalCtaSub: Free to start. Smarter than ChatGPT. Built by parents who got tired of asking ChatGPT.
marketingHome.finalCtaPrivacyPill: Family data is yours. Not sold. Never used to train AI.
marketingHome.footerTagline: The trusted parenting adviser for your whole family.
marketingHome.footerBuilt: Built by parents, for parents. Registered in England & Wales.

settingsPage.displayNameHint: Visible to others in your village · saved automatically
settingsPage.addToHomeScreenDesc: iOS Safari: Share → Add to Home Screen · Android: Menu → Add to Home Screen
settingsPage.installDescription: Add Raised to your home screen for one-tap access.
settingsPage.installNotAvailable: Your browser will offer install when ready. iOS Safari: Share, then Add to Home Screen. Android Chrome: Menu, then Install app.
settingsPage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently remove your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settingsPage.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your profile, families, conversations, and uploads. Type DELETE to confirm.
settingsPage.deleteFamilyConfirmBody: This removes the family along with its children, members, and invites. This cannot be undone.
settingsPage.newFamilyHint: Useful for separated households or co-parenting.
settingsPage.inviteMemberHint: We'll email them an invite to join this family.
settingsPage.removeMemberConfirmBody: They will lose access to this family.
settingsPage.addChildHint: Add each child so you get age-appropriate guidance.
settingsPage.removeChildConfirmBody: Their data will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
settingsPage.noMembersYet: No members yet. Invite a co-parent to share.
settingsPage.noChildrenYet: No children added yet. Add one to personalize guidance.
settingsPage.familyError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settingsPage.signOutConfirmBody: You can sign back in any time with the same email and password.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pushDesc: Get tips and reminders on this device.
notifications.pushBlocked: Push notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings, then try again.
notifications.pushBlockedHint: Blocked in browser settings. Allow notifications for this site, then toggle on.
notifications.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
notifications.pushUnsupportedHint: Not available in this browser. Install Raised to your home screen on iOS for push support.
notifications.dailyTipDesc: One short, age-appropriate idea each day.
notifications.weeklyRecapDesc: Sunday summary of your family's progress.
notifications.courseRemindersDesc: Nudges to continue lessons you've started.
notifications.calendarRemindersDesc: Heads-up before events on your family calendar.
notifications.quietHoursDesc: Hold all notifications during this window.
notifications.pushNotConfigured: Push isn't configured on this server yet.
notifications.testHint: Send yourself a test push to confirm delivery on this device.
notifications.testNotDelivered: Push provider accepted, but no devices received it. Check this device's notification permission.

security.title: Security
security.changePasswordDesc: Use a strong password you don't reuse elsewhere.
security.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
security.sameAsOld: New password must be different from your current one.
security.googleOnlyDesc: Your account uses Google sign-in, so there's no password to change here. Manage it in your Google account.

resourcesPage.noResourcesFoundDesc: Try broadening your search or selecting another category.

chatPage.couldNotStart: Could not start a conversation. Please try again.
chatPage.somethingWentWrong: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
chatPage.screenTimeChild: How much screen time is okay for {{name}}?
chatPage.speechDelay: When to worry about speech delay
chatPage.learningAtHome: How do I support {{name}}'s learning at home?
chatPage.socialSkills: Helping with social skills and friendships
chatPage.sleepHabits: Better sleep habits for school-age kids
chatPage.screenTimeGeneral: How much screen time is okay?
chatPage.welcomeTitle: The parenting copilot that carries the load
chatPage.welcomeSubtitle: From pregnancy to 18. Ask anything on your mind, from sleep regressions to tantrums to picky eating. Every answer is backed by pediatric science and trusted sources, written for the moment you're actually in.
chatPage.qPregnancy: Is it normal to feel Braxton Hicks at 34 weeks?
chatPage.qBaby: Why won't my 4-month-old sleep through the night?
chatPage.qToddler: How do I handle tantrums without losing it?
chatPage.qTeen: How should I talk to my teen about social media?
chatPage.evidenceBasedTagline: Raised answers in seconds with guidance backed by pediatric science, tailored to your child's age, with sources you can check.
chatPage.disclaimer: Evidence-based · Not a substitute for professional medical advice
chatPage.signInToChatHint: Free account. We'll keep your draft safe.
chatPage.deleteConversationConfirmBody: The full message history will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
